programme.desc: Voight believes the man who tried to kill him is someone he and Olinsky once put away; Atwater unintentionally spills information about Ruzek's history that disturbs Burgess.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: The largest police investigation of the decade lasted 23 days to catch a sniper who terrorized Washington, D. C. residents.

programme.desc: A video of Casey from the roof rescue goes viral; Mouch sets up a Little Free Library at Firehouse 51; Herrmann breaks protocol.

programme.title: Chicago Fire

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: A search mission for three women missing in Yosemite Park turns to a murder investigation when two are discovered in the trunk of their burned out car.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: Police search for the killer of an elderly upscale Toronto couple.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A single woman and her two young sons believe they have found a perfect new apartment, but their overbearing landlord and neighbor soon turns their idyllic situation into a living hell of arguments and intimidation that finally ends in bloodshed.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: When an unidentified burned corpse is found in a field, state-of-the-art forensics is turned to.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One attempts to contain a radioactive threat with the help of firefighters, paramedics and the military.

programme.desc: A single woman and her two young sons believe they have found a perfect new apartment, but their overbearing landlord and neighbor soon turns their idyllic situation into a living hell of arguments and intimidation that finally ends in bloodshed.
